title: Medxec
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Medxec''' was the title of the leader of the [[Coruscant Health Office/Legends|Coruscant Health Administration]]. As of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], it was [[Harribore Onuta]]. The term was also used to describe the executives of major hospitals and other health-related organizations.

==Appearances==
*{{HoloNetNewsWeb|51|news/13411_3.html|Port Crowding Increases Virus Risks}}
